notes: Builds an AI-driven pipeline for detecting/refactoring data clumps via LLMs, then runs preliminary experiments varying parameters (model, instruction format, data format, temperature) evaluated against a manually-created ground truth (sensitivity/specificity, refactoring score) on a 90-LOC toy project and ArgoUML. Human-in-the-loop is a design feature, not a study with participants, so human_subjects=false.
